headline: Stock Market News for July 23, 2026
summary: Wall Street closed lower on Wednesday, dragged down by communications and discretionary stocks.

headline: Reddit’s Oil Bet on Occidental Clashes With Wall Street’s Caution
summary: Retail traders are flooding into Occidental Petroleum with near-unanimous bullish conviction while Wall Street analysts quietly trim their targets and a top insider unloads tens of thousands of shares. Someone has the trade badly wrong.
